summary: SAP — support both SOAP and OData v4 transport
description_md:
The SAP S/4 Connector must support both SOAP and OData v4 transport protocols to enable seamless integration with legacy and modern SAP data sources across multi-tenant environments.

**Measurable Constraints**:

1. SOAP transport must support WS-Security 1.1 with X.509 certificate authentication and achieve ≤200ms latency for standard BAPI calls
2. OData v4 transport must support batch operations with ≥50 requests per batch and proper HTTP status code propagation
3. Both protocols must include automatic retry logic (3 attempts, exponential backoff) for transient network failures
4. Connection health checks must execute every 5 minutes with ≤30 second timeout per protocol
5. All transport-layer errors must be logged to the audit log with correlation IDs traceable to the originating tenant
